name: AI Core
description: AI orchestration, model management, and nsfw_ai_server connectivity for Cove.
author: Cove Team

tutorialTopics.title: AI
tutorialTopics.description: Model setup, capability extensions, and AI-assisted media workflows.

slides.title: Use Cove's AI stack
slides.caption: The AI extensions work together: AI Core queues runs and specialist extensions contribute tagging, visual, audio, and face capabilities.
slides.bodyMarkdown: Install **AI Core** first, then enable the capability extensions you need. Run AI on a small video or image selection before broad cleanup so generated metadata stays reviewable.

tutorialTopics.title: AI Core
tutorialTopics.description: AI model setup, run queues, and video or image analysis workflows.

slides.title: Connect the AI server
slides.caption: AI Core uses the configured nsfw_ai_server endpoint and path mappings before queueing model work.
slides.bodyMarkdown: Set the server URL in Settings, check capabilities before large runs, and keep path mappings aligned with Cove media paths.

slides.title: Run AI on selected media
slides.caption: Use video or image selections to queue repeatable AI runs once the model stack is ready.
slides.bodyMarkdown: Select media first, choose a run target, then review generated artifacts before applying broad cleanup decisions.
